## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / build

## Related issue

<!-- Fixes #XXX, closes #YYY -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / `docs/` / SPEC as applicable).
- [ ] No new secrets, credentials, or API keys committed.
- [ ] Privacy impact considered: does this PR introduce new data sent to LLMs or new MCP tools?
